title: Principal Frontend Developer at NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners:
NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners!
